# chalk_environment_offline_store_connection_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk environment and an offline store connection.

**Required permissions:** `deploy.create`, `deploy.read`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment to bind to the offline store connection.
- `offline_store_connection_id` (String) The ID of the offline store connection to bind to the environment.
